texto: To engage in activism that envisions alternatives ways of organizing society and alternative ways of being is to risk membership in society, a sense of belonging, however partial it may be. Activism can make us vulnerable because it is so obviously about wanting something beyond what is, and to have a political desire often is construed as wanting too much.
explicacao: Citação de Deborah B. Gould sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “To engage in activism that envisions alternatives ways of organizing society and alternative ways…” articula reflexao, activism, aids em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como aids e queer.
